member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1
member.summary: Represents a collection of items with paging, sorting and row edit capabilities.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.IsRefreshRequired
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the data should be refreshed. This property is set to true automatically when paging, sorting or other options change.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the items for the current page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.PagingOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the settings for paging.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.RowEditOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the settings for row (item) edit feature.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.SortingOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the settings for sorting.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.GoToPage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Navigates to the specific page.
member.param: The zero-based index of the page to navigate to.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.LoadFromQueryable(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0})
member.summary: Loads data into the from the given source.
member.param: The source to load data from.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.RequestRefresh
member.summary: Requests to reload data into the .

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.SetSortExpression(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the sort expression. If the specified expression is already set, switches the sort direction.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.ApplyFilteringToQueryable(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0})
member.summary: Applies filtering to the before the total number of items is retrieved.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.ApplyOptionsToQueryable(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0})
member.summary: Applies options to the after the total number of items is retrieved.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.ApplySortingToQueryable(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0})
member.summary: Applies sorting to the after the total number of items is retrieved.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSet`1.ApplyPagingToQueryable(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0})
member.summary: Applies paging to the after the total number of items is retrieved.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSetExtensions.GoToFirstPage(DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPageableGridViewDataSet)
member.summary: Navigates to the first page.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSetExtensions.GoToPreviousPage(DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPageableGridViewDataSet)
member.summary: Navigates to the previous page if possible.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSetExtensions.GoToNextPage(DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPageableGridViewDataSet)
member.summary: Navigates to the next page if possible.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.GridViewDataSetExtensions.GoToLastPage(DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPageableGridViewDataSet)
member.summary: Navigates to the last page.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IBaseGridViewDataSet`1
member.summary: Defines the basic contract for DataSets.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IBaseGridViewDataSet`1.Items
member.summary: Gets the items for the current page.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IBaseGridViewDataSet
member.summary: Defines the basic contract for DataSets.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IBaseGridViewDataSet.Items
member.summary: Gets the items for the current page.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IGridViewDataSet`1
member.summary: Represents a collection of items with paging, sorting and row edit capabilities.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IGridViewDataSet
member.summary: Represents a collection of items with paging, sorting and row edit capabilities.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPageableGridViewDataSet
member.summary: Extends the with paging functionality.

member.summary: Gets the settings for paging.

member.summary: Navigates to the specific page.

member.summary: Extends the with refresh functionality.

member.summary: Gets whether the data should be refreshed. This property is set to true automatically when paging, sorting or other options change.

member.summary: Requests to reload data into the .

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowEditGridViewDataSet
member.summary: Extends the with row edit functionality.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowEditGridViewDataSet.RowEditOptions
member.summary: Gets the settings for row (item) edit feature.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertGridViewDataSet`1
member.summary: Extends the with row insert functionality.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertGridViewDataSet`1.RowInsertOptions
member.summary: Gets the settings for row (item) insert feature.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertGridViewDataSet
member.summary: Extends the with row insert functionality.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertGridViewDataSet.RowInsertOptions
member.summary: Gets the settings for row (item) insert feature.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.ISortableGridViewDataSet
member.summary: Extends the base GridViewDataSet with sorting functionality.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.ISortableGridViewDataSet.SortingOptions
member.summary: Gets the settings for sorting.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.ISortableGridViewDataSet.SetSortExpression(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the sort expression. If the specified expression is already set, switches the sort direction.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.DistanceNearPageIndexesProvider
member.summary: Provides a list of page indexes near current paged based on distance.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.DistanceNearPageIndexesProvider.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The distance specifying the range of page indexes to return.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.DistanceNearPageIndexesProvider.GetIndexes(DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions)
member.summary: Gets a list of page indexes near current page.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.INearPageIndexesProvider
member.summary: Provides a list of page indexes near current page. It can be used to build data pagers.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.INearPageIndexesProvider.GetIndexes(DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions)
member.summary: Gets a list of page indexes near current page.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions
member.summary: Represents settings for paging.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions.PageIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets a zero-based index of the current page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions.PageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of items on a page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions.TotalItemsCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of items in the data store without respect to paging.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions.IsFirstPage
member.summary: Gets whether the represents the first page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions.IsLastPage
member.summary: Gets whether the represents the last page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions.PagesCount
member.summary: Gets the total number of pages.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IPagingOptions.NearPageIndexes
member.summary: Gets a list of page indexes near the current page. It can be used to build data pagers.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowEditOptions
member.summary: Represents settings for the row (item) edit feature.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowEditOptions.PrimaryKeyPropertyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of a property that uniquely identifies a row. (row ID, primary key, etc.). The value may be left out if inline editing is not enabled.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowEditOptions.EditRowId
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of a property for the row that is being edited. Null if nothing is edited.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertOptions`1
member.summary: Represents settings for row (item) insert feature.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertOptions`1.InsertedRow
member.summary: Gets or sets the row to be inserted to data source. Null means that row insertion is not activated.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertOptions
member.summary: Represents settings for row (item) insert feature.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.IRowInsertOptions.InsertedRow
member.summary: Gets or sets the row to be inserted into data source. Null means that row insertion is not activated.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.ISortingOptions
member.summary: Represents settings for sorting.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.ISortingOptions.SortDescending
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the sort order should be descending.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.ISortingOptions.SortExpression
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that is used for sorting. Null means the grid should not be sorted.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions
member.summary: Represents settings for paging.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.NearPageIndexesProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the object that provides a list of page indexes near the current page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.IsFirstPage
member.summary: Gets whether the represents the first page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.IsLastPage
member.summary: Gets whether the represents the last page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.PagesCount
member.summary: Gets the total number of pages.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.PageIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets a zero-based index of the current page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.PageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of items on a page.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.TotalItemsCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of items in the data store without respect to paging.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.PagingOptions.NearPageIndexes
member.summary: Gets a list of page indexes near the current page. It can be used to build data pagers.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.RowEditOptions
member.summary: Represents settings for the row (item) edit feature.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.RowEditOptions.PrimaryKeyPropertyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of a property that uniquely identifies a row. (row ID, primary key, etc.). The value may be left out if inline editing is not enabled.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.RowEditOptions.EditRowId
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of a property for the row that is being edited. Null if nothing is edited.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.RowInsertOptions`1
member.summary: Represents settings for row (item) insert feature.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.RowInsertOptions`1.InsertedRow
member.summary: Gets or sets the row to be inserted to data source.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.SortingOptions
member.summary: Represents settings for sorting.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.SortingOptions.SortDescending
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the sort order should be descending.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.Controls.SortingOptions.SortExpression
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that is used for sorting. Null means the grid should not be sorted.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.AllowStaticCommandAttribute
member.summary: Allows DotVVM to call the method from staticCommand.
member.remarks: This attribute must be used to prevent attackers from calling any method in your system. While DotVVM signs the method names used staticCommand and it shouldn't be possible to execute any other method, the attribute offers a decent protection against RCE in case the Asp.Net Core encryption keys are compromised.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.BindAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the binding direction.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.BindAttribute.Direction
member.summary: Gets the binding direction.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.BindAttribute.Name
member.summary: Name of the property in JSON and JS viewModel. Null leaves the name unmodified

member.name: M:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.BindAttribute.#ctor(DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction
member.summary: Specifies on which requests should the property be serialized and sent. Default is Both. Set to None to disable serialization of the property. This enumeration can be treated as flags, the directions can be arbitrarily combined.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.None
member.summary: Never send this property to the client, it won't be allowed to use this property from value and staticCommand bindings.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.ServerToClientFirstRequest
member.summary: Sent to client on the initial GET request, but not sent again on postbacks

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.ServerToClientPostback
member.summary: Property is updated on postbacks, but not sent on the first request (initially it will be set to null or default value of the primitive type)

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.ServerToClient
member.summary: Sent from server to client, but not sent back.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.ClientToServerNotInPostbackPath
member.summary: Complement to , not meant to be used on its own.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.ClientToServerInPostbackPath
member.summary: Sent from client to server, but only if the current data context is this property. If the data context is a child object of this property, only that part of the object will be sent, all other properties are ignored. To sent the initial value to client, use Direction.ServerToClientFirstRequest | Direction.ClientToServerInPostbackPath

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.ClientToServer
member.summary: Sent back on postbacks. Initially the property will set to null or primitive default value. To send the initial value to client, use Direction.ServerToClientFirstRequest | Direction.ClientToServer

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.IfInPostbackPath
member.summary: Always sent to client, sent back only when the object is the current data context (see also )

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.Direction.Both
member.summary: Value is sent on each request. This is the default value.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.IDotvvmPrimitiveType
member.summary: Marker interface instructing DotVVM to treat the type as a primitive type. The type is required to have a static TryParse(string, [IFormatProvider,] out T) method and expected to implement ToString() method which is compatible with the TryParse method. Primitive types are then serialized as string in client-side view models.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.ProtectAttribute
member.summary: Defines the protection mode of the property in ViewModel.

member.name: T:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.ProtectMode
member.summary: An enumeration of possible view model data protection modes.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.ProtectMode.None
member.summary: The property value is sent to the client unencrypted and it is not signed. It can be modified on the client with no restrictions. This is the default.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.ProtectMode.SignData
member.summary: The property value is sent to the client in both unencrypted and encrypted form. On server, the encrypted value is read, so it cannot be modified on the client.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.ProtectMode.EncryptData
member.summary: The property value is encrypted before it is sent to the client. Encrypted properties thus cannot be used in value bindings.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.StaticCommandValidation.None
member.summary: Default value - no validation should be performed. This setting is backwards compatible with DotVVM before 4.2

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.StaticCommandValidation.Manual
member.summary: Attach only manually added errors and clean any previous errors on target observables. Use the "StaticCommandModelState" class to add the errors.

member.name: F:DotVVM.Framework.ViewModel.StaticCommandValidation.Automatic
member.summary: Validates all arguments - any child objects implementing IValidatableObject and checks validation attributes. It is also possible to manually add errors.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Core.Storage.IReturnedFileStorage.StoreFileAsync(System.IO.Stream,DotVVM.Core.Storage.ReturnedFileMetadata)
member.summary: Stores the file and returns its unique ID.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Core.Storage.IReturnedFileStorage.GetFileAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the file from the storage.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Core.Storage.IReturnedFileStorage.DeleteFileAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes the file with the specified ID.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Core.Storage.IUploadedFileStorage.StoreFileAsync(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Stores uploaded file and returns its unique ID.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Core.Storage.IUploadedFileStorage.DeleteFileAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes the uploaded file with the specified ID.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Core.Storage.IUploadedFileStorage.GetFileAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the stream of the file with the specified ID.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Core.Storage.UploadedFile.FileId
member.summary: A unique, randomly generated ID of the uploaded file. Use this ID to get the file from

member.name: P:DotVVM.Core.Storage.UploadedFile.FileName
member.summary: A user-specified name of the file. Use with caution, the user may specify this to be any string (for example ../../Web.config).

member.name: P:DotVVM.Core.Storage.UploadedFile.FileSize
member.summary: Length of the file in bytes. Use with caution, the user may manipulate with this property and it might not correspond to the file returned from .

member.name: P:DotVVM.Core.Storage.UploadedFile.IsFileTypeAllowed
member.summary: If the file type matched one of type MIME types or extensions in FileUpload.AllowedFileTypes. Use with caution, the user may manipulate with this property.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Core.Storage.UploadedFile.IsMaxSizeExceeded
member.summary: If the file size is larger that the limit specified in FileUpload.MaxFileSize. Use with caution, the user may manipulate with this property.

member.name: P:DotVVM.Core.Storage.UploadedFile.IsAllowed
member.summary: If the file satisfies both allowed file types and the size limit. Use with caution, the user may manipulate with this property.

member.name: M:DotVVM.Core.Storage.UploadedFileStorageExtensions.SaveAsAsync(DotVVM.Core.Storage.IUploadedFileStorage,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Saves an uploaded file with the specified ID to the given location.

member.name: T:System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.DotvvmEnforceClientFormatAttribute
member.summary: Checks whether the value matches the format specified by DotVVM control (e.g. TextBox). The value can be empty string or null. If it is not, it must match the FormatString that the control specifies.

member.name: T:System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.DotvvmClientFormatAttribute
member.summary: Checks whether the value matches the format specified by DotVVM control (e.g. TextBox). The value can be empty string or null. If it is not, it must match the FormatString that the control specifies.
